source_excerpt: "Can't you give me brains?" asked the Scarecrow.

speaker.notes: No canonical speaker could be inferred from the source context.

review_notes: Speaker could not be resolved from the source context.

dialogue_text: You don't need them. You are learning something every day. A baby has brains, but it doesn't know much. Experience is the only thing that brings knowledge, and the longer you are on earth the more experience you are sure to get.
source_excerpt: "You don't need them. You are learning something every day. A baby has brains, but it doesn't know much. Experience is the only thing that brings knowledge, and the longer you are on earth the more experience you are sure to get."

source_excerpt: "That may all be true," said the Scarecrow, "but I shall be very unhappy unless you give me brains."
